text: BridgeBrain uses the already-authenticated Codex ChatGPT login. It never reads or copies auth tokens, browser cookies, API keys, session files, or Codex auth files.
The default BridgeBrain quality profile is chatgpt-bridge-semantic-hash-1536 with 1536 dimensions. The 768 dimensional model is only an explicit compatibility fallback.
BridgeBrain ships installers for Linux systemd user services, macOS launchd LaunchAgents, and Windows user Scheduled Tasks.
The GBrain LiteLLM compatibility patch allows user-provided LiteLLM embedding model ids from config. If the expected gateway.ts pattern changes, the patch stops and asks for inspection.
BridgeBrain does not claim benchmark victory without evidence. It ships fixtures, query sets, recall, and MRR scoring so developers can benchmark it, break it, and prove it.
BridgeBrain caches structured semantic fingerprints by source text hash. It avoids storing raw source text in cache files, but derived fingerprints can still reveal sensitive meaning.
